title: × dupoa labradorica
intro: × Dupoa labradorica, also known as Labrador tea, is a type of flowering plant native to the boreal forests of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Labrador tea include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Labrador tea can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
